translations.vi: Tôi thật sự ghét bạo lực.
translations.nl: Ik heb echt een hekel aan geweld.
translations.hi: मुझे सच में हिंसा से नफ़रत है.
translations.ja: 暴力は本当に嫌いです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; functions as the subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb (present, 1st person singular) expressing the speaker’s attitude; takes a direct object.
Common noun, feminine; here accusative singular as the direct object of the verb.
Degree/manner adverb modifying the verb phrase; intensifies the statement.

sentences.target: Im Stadion gab es keine Gewalt.

translations.de: Im Stadion gab es keine Gewalt.
translations.en: There was no violence at the stadium.
translations.es: No hubo violencia en el estadio.
translations.fr: Il n'y a pas eu de violence au stade.
translations.it: Non c'è stata violenza allo stadio.
translations.zh-Hans: 体育场里没有发生暴力事件。
translations.yue: 喺球場冇發生暴力事件。
translations.vi: Không có bạo lực nào ở sân vận động.
translations.ar: لم تحدث أي أعمال عنف في الملعب.
translations.nl: Er was geen geweld in het stadion.
translations.hi: स्टेडियम में कोई हिंसा नहीं हुई.
translations.nb: Det var ingen vold på stadion.
translations.sv: Det förekom inget våld på arenan.
translations.ro: Nu a fost nicio violență pe stadion.
translations.cs: Na stadionu nedošlo k žádnému násilí.
translations.da: Der var ingen vold på stadion.
translations.ja: スタジアムでは暴力は起きませんでした。

tokens.explanation: Preposition contracted with a definite article (in + dem); introduces a dative prepositional phrase indicating location.
Common noun, neuter; dative singular as the object of the preposition ‘im’, marking the location.
Finite main verb in preterite (3rd person singular); used existentially with ‘es’ to express ‘there was/were’.
Impersonal pronoun functioning as an expletive/anticipatory subject in the existential construction ‘es gab’.
Negative determiner agreeing with ‘Gewalt’ (feminine, accusative singular); quantifies the noun as zero amount.
Common noun; accusative singular as the complement/direct object in the existential construction.

sentences.target: Der Film zeigt wirklich zu viel Gewalt.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ fɪlm ˈt͡saɪ̯kt ˈvɪʁklɪç t͡suː fiːl ɡəˈvalt/

translations.de: Der Film zeigt wirklich zu viel Gewalt.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ fɪlm ˈt͡saɪ̯kt ˈvɪʁklɪç t͡suː fiːl ɡəˈvalt/
translations.en: The movie shows way too much violence.
translations.fr: Le film montre beaucoup trop de violence.
translations.it: Il film mostra fin troppa violenza.
translations.ko: 그 영화는 폭력 묘사가 지나치게 많아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这部电影的暴力情节实在太多了。
translations.yue: 呢套戲入面嘅暴力場面真係多到離譜。
translations.ru: В этом фильме слишком много насилия.
translations.vi: Bộ phim có quá nhiều cảnh bạo lực.
translations.ar: الفيلم يعرض عنفًا أكثر من اللازم.
translations.nl: De film bevat veel te veel geweld.
translations.uk: У цьому фільмі занадто багато насильства.
translations.hu: Ebben a filmben túl sok az erőszak.
translations.hi: इस फ़िल्म में हिंसा हद से ज़्यादा है.
translations.pl: W tym filmie jest stanowczo za dużo przemocy.
translations.el: Η ταινία δείχνει υπερβολικά πολλή βία.
translations.id: Film ini menampilkan kekerasan yang berlebihan.
translations.sv: Filmen visar alldeles för mycket våld.
translations.ro: Filmul arată mult prea multă violență.
translations.cs: Ten film ukazuje až příliš mnoho násilí.
translations.da: Filmen viser alt for meget vold.
translations.ja: この映画は暴力表現が多すぎます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine nominative singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine; nominative singular functioning as the subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb (present, 3rd person singular); transitive, selecting a direct object.
Adverbial intensifier modifying the predicate; emphasizes the degree/extent of the statement.
Degree adverb meaning ‘too (excessively)’; modifies the quantifier ‘viel’.
Quantifier determiner; combines with the noun ‘Gewalt’ and is modified by ‘zu’ to indicate excess.
Common noun; accusative singular as the direct object of ‘zeigt’ (‘shows too much violence’).

sentences.target: Er spricht offen über Gewalt in der Schule.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ ʃpʁɪçt ˈɔfən ˈyːbɐ ɡəˈvalt ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə/

translations.de: Er spricht offen über Gewalt in der Schule.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ ʃpʁɪçt ˈɔfən ˈyːbɐ ɡəˈvalt ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə/
translations.en: He speaks openly about violence at school.
translations.es: Habla abiertamente sobre la violencia en la escuela.
translations.fr: Il parle ouvertement de la violence à l'école.
translations.it: Parla apertamente della violenza a scuola.
translations.ko: 그는 학교에서의 폭력에 대해 솔직하게 이야기해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他坦率地谈论学校里的暴力。
translations.yue: 佢公開咁講學校入面嘅暴力。
translations.ru: Он открыто говорит о насилии в школе.
translations.pt: Ele fala abertamente sobre a violência na escola.
translations.he: הוא מדבר בגלוי על אלימות בבית הספר.
translations.vi: Anh ấy nói thẳng thắn về bạo lực ở trường.
translations.ar: هو يتحدث بصراحة عن العنف في المدرسة.
translations.nl: Hij praat openlijk over geweld op school.
translations.uk: Він відкрито говорить про насильство в школі.
translations.hi: वह स्कूल में होने वाली हिंसा के बारे में खुलकर बात करता है.
translations.pl: On otwarcie mówi o przemocy w szkole.
translations.el: Μιλά ανοιχτά για τη βία στο σχολείο.
translations.nb: Han snakker åpent om vold på skolen.
translations.id: Dia berbicara secara terbuka tentang kekerasan di sekolah.
translations.sv: Han pratar öppet om våld i skolan.
translations.ro: El vorbește deschis despre violența din școală.
translations.cs: Otevřeně mluví o násilí ve škole.
translations.da: Han taler åbent om vold i skolen.
translations.ja: 彼は学校の暴力について率直に話します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb (present, 3rd person singular); intransitive here, taking a prepositional complement with ‘über’.
Manner adverb modifying the verb; indicates the way of speaking.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces the topic PP (‘about …’).
Common noun; accusative singular as the complement of the preposition ‘über’; head of the NP specifying the topic.
Preposition; here governing the dative to express static location within the NP (‘in der Schule’).
Definite article, feminine dative singular; determiner for ‘Schule’ inside the PP.
Common noun, feminine; dative singular as the object of the preposition ‘in’, specifying the context/location.
